tooltip: - Additional Starting Technologies:  - Gravity Snares  - Artificial Breeding  - Available Starbase Buildings: Beastports  - Home System: Start with a Beastport  - Starting Military Ships are replaced with Space Amoebas  - Starting Genetic Material:  - §0Common Space Amoeba  - The Fast Food Chain Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

name: Sequenced Securities
description: The genetic sequence of every customer and employee is recorded in a database that anyone can access for a modest fee. Enforcement agencies rely on this service intensively to identify nefarious actors from even the smallest residues.
tooltip: - The Private Security Company Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

name: Decentralized R&D
description: Regular inter-department innovation competitions spur this corporation's R&D initiatives.
tooltip: - Factions produce Research instead of Unity   - Factions will form in your empire shortly after the game starts   - The Private Research Enterprises Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

name: Corporate Vampires
description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for Psionic Ascension.  This Megacorporation drains valuable metabolism from idle population via parasitic psychic connections. Once properly collected, these energies can be redistributed to senior management.

name: Fortune Enterprise
description: This corporation claims to have discovered a ritualistic mechanism to predict the future, leveraging esoteric pattern recognition and cyclical anomaly analysis. To maximize outcomes, future gains and losses are weighed alongside the KPIs of ideal celestial alignments.
tooltip: Replaces:  - Priests with Fortune Tellers  - High Priests with Fortune Brokers Enables Galactic Dowsing Every 13 years, the Cycle changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.
effects: Replaces:  - Priests with Fortune Tellers  - High Priests with Fortune Brokers Enables Galactic Dowsing Every 13 years, the Cycle changes. Fortune Events will periodically benefit or impair your empire.

name: Judicial R&D
description: This Megacorporation has actioned an exciting initiative to reduce judicial inefficiencies while maximizing scientific innovation. Problematic citizens are reassigned to experimental research projects, undergoing rigorous testing to achieve technological breakthroughs. Fatality metrics are maintained within projected expectations.
tooltip: Starts with Experimental Testing situation, which grants technology insight upon completion. Can construct and starts with: Experimentation Chambers. Can construct Experimentation Offices Corporate Building. All non-Machine slaves get access to the Orderlies Slave Job. Access to Slave Army: Abominations

name: Influential Cartel
description: This Megacorporation's most powerful offices conduct extraplanetary operations on a strictly need-to-know basis. If you need to ask, you don't need to know.
tooltip: Clandestine Factions will emerge after contacting other empires. Starts with the ability to conduct Proxy Wars. [bureaucrat.GetIcon] [bureaucrat.GetNamePlural] will produce Unity per active and successful Proxy War. Starts in First Contact with two neighboring empires. name: Chosen Executives
description: WARNING: Blocks all Ascension Paths except for Psionic Ascension.  Since their founding, this corporation has owed its success to a mysterious Shroud entity, and has been operating under a pact of patronage ever since.
tooltip: - Starts the game in contact with a Shroud Patron. - Additional Starting Technologies: Psionic Aura - The Psionic Offices Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital.

name: Corporate Thinktank
description: This society universally adopted an experimental product in the form of specialized habitation vats. As a result, they are heavily reliant on assistive equipment and incapable of engaging directly in physical work.
tooltip: Adds the Tankbound trait. Rural Districts have their Worker Jobs fully Automated.  Colonist Jobs are Specialists. Start with insight on Assembly Patterns Technology.  Urban Districts have additional Production Overseers jobs. The Virtual Entertainment Studios Corporate Building generates additional Trade and adds +200 Trader jobs to our Capital. name: Planetary Architects
description: This society thrives in volcanic environments, and will even create them artificially when nature falls short.
tooltip: - Unlocks starting planet: Volcanic World.  - Guaranteed Research Options: Volcanic Forge.  - Can construct Volcanic Forge building which adds Thermotechnic Mentors.  - Planets with a Volcanic Forge will gradually turn into a Volcanic World.  - Guaranteed Habitable Worlds will be Dry worlds.

name: Biometallic Cartel
description: WARNING: Blocks access to Synthetic Ascension.  This society is able to synthesize regular alloys into Living Metal, and molds its strength and shape-changing properties directly into their technology.
tooltip: - Starts with Living Metal already researched.  - Homeworld has a Living Metal Sediment. - Gain access to special Edicts:   - Centrifugal Siphoning   - Modular Growth Compounds  - Gives access to Living Metal components:   - Regenerative Armor   - Reshaping Projectile Accelerator - Has access to Planetary Decision: Distribute Living Metal.  - Can recruit the Mimetic Strike Force armies.  - Can build a Offworld Expedition Hub in systems with a Molten World for Offworld Prospector jobs.  - Can build the Living Metal Enhancement Clinic Corporate Building.
